original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Emma, Sebastian, Logan, and Avery. Emma stated, "If Sebastian is a knave then Logan is a knight". "Emma is a knight or Sebastian is a knight," Sebastian mentioned. Logan noted, "Emma is a knave or Sebastian is a knight". Avery said that Logan is a knight if and only if Emma is a knight. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
